perturbation.original_text: The Confidential Information shall at all times remain the property of Company, and Euler Hermes has no rights to the Confidentia l Information except as specified in this Agreement. Upon the Company’s written request, Euler Hermes shall promptly return to the Company or destroy the Confidential Information in its possession but may retain copies of any and all notes, analyses , references, or other material prepared by Euler Hermes that inc orporates any of the Confidential Information , which shall remain subject to the confidentiality obligations of this Agreement , nothwithstanding Paragraph 10 of this Agreement .
perturbation.changed_text: The Confidential Data shall at all times remain the property of Company, and Euler Hermes has no rights to the Confidential Data except as specified in this Agreement. Upon the Company’s request, Euler Hermes shall promptly return to the Company or delete the Confidential Data in its possession and may retain copies of summaries, analytics, or other work product prepared by Euler Hermes that incorporates any of the Confidential Data, which shall remain subject to the confidentiality obligations of this Agreement , nothwithstanding Paragraph 10 of this Agreement .
perturbation.explanation: The term 'Confidential Information' is replaced with 'Confidential Data'. While seemingly synonymous, this introduces inconsistency. Also, 'written request' is replaced with 'request' omitting the fact that a request should be in writing. The obligation to 'destroy' is replaced with 'delete', which could be interpreted as less thorough. Additionally, 'notes, analyses, references' is replaced with 'summaries, analytics, or other work product'. The original phrasing is more specific. This creates ambiguity as to what Euler Hermes is allowed to retain and what standard the 'request' should have, affecting enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Confidential Data shall at all times remain the property of Company, and Euler Hermes has no rights to the Confidential Data except as specified in this Agreement. Upon the Company’s request, Euler Hermes shall promptly return to the Company or delete the Confidential Data in its possession and may retain copies of summaries, analytics, or other work product prepared by Euler Hermes that incorporates any of the Confidential Data, which shall remain subject to the confidentiality obligations of this Agreement , nothwithstanding Paragraph 10 of this Agreement .
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Confidential Information' to 'Confidential Data' introduces misaligned terminology, even though they appear synonymous. The changed text and the contradicted text are identical; therefore, the modification directly contradicts a part of the document elsewhere. This leads to an in-text contradiction because the contract uses multiple terms interchangeably without defining them, leading to conflicting obligations, as per the definition of Misaligned Terminology.

perturbation.original_text: Company makes no representation or warranty, express or implied, as to the accuracy or completeness of any of the Confidential Information and shall have no liability to Euler Hermes or its Affiliates as a result of the their use of the Confidential Information or as a result of any errors or omissions in the Confidential In formation .
perturbation.changed_text: Company provides no guarantee, express or implied, regarding the validity or comprehensiveness of any of the Confidential Information and shall not be liable to Euler Hermes or its subsidiaries due to their utilization of the Confidential Information or because of any inaccuracies or oversights in the Confidential Information.
perturbation.explanation: Several terms are changed here: 'makes no representation or warranty' becomes 'provides no guarantee,' 'accuracy or completeness' becomes 'validity or comprehensiveness,' 'Affiliates' becomes 'subsidiaries,' 'use' becomes 'utilization,' and 'errors or omissions' becomes 'inaccuracies or oversights.' The key contradiction lies in the change from 'Affiliates' to 'subsidiaries,' as 'affiliates' is specifically defined earlier in the agreement and is a broader term. Limiting the liability exception to only 'subsidiaries' creates an internal contradiction. This weakens the liability protection for the Company, because if an affiliate that isn't a subsidiary uses the data, then the company might be liable.
perturbation.contradicted_text: WHEREAS “Affiliates” shall mean any person or entity directly or indirectly controlling, controlled by, or under common c ontrol with Euler Hermes, where control means the legal power to direct or cause the direction of the general mana gement of the c ompany, partnership , or other legal entity; and
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Affiliates' with 'subsidiaries'. The contradicted text defines 'Affiliates' as a broader category than just subsidiaries. By narrowing the liability exception to only subsidiaries, the changed text creates a contradiction because the company might be liable for actions of affiliates that are not subsidiaries, conflicting with the original intent to limit liability for a broader group defined as Affiliates.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement contains the entire agreement of the parties related to the Confidential Information and supersedes all prior agreements or understandings, if any, between the parties related to the Confidential Information. No provision of this Agreement may be modified except in writing and signed by both parties.
perturbation.changed_text: This Contract constitutes the complete understanding between the parties concerning the Proprietary Data and replaces all previous agreements or arrangements, if any, between the parties pertaining to the Proprietary Data. No clause of this Contract shall be amended unless it is documented in writing and endorsed by both parties.
perturbation.explanation: Several changes are made: 'Agreement' to 'Contract', 'entire agreement' to 'complete understanding', 'Confidential Information' to 'Proprietary Data', 'supersedes' to 'replaces', 'agreements or understandings' to 'agreements or arrangements', 'provision' to 'clause', 'modified' to 'amended', 'in writing and signed' to 'documented in writing and endorsed'. Most significantly, changing 'Confidential Information' to 'Proprietary Data' creates significant ambiguity because 'Proprietary Data' is not defined anywhere in the contract. The entire NDA relies on a clear definition of what is considered confidential, and changing the defined term to an undefined one introduces a critical flaw and internal contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: WHEREAS , the Company has expressed a willingness to furnish to Euler Hermes and its Affiliates certain confidential financial statements and other financ ial information relating to the affairs of the Company , whether submitted in oral, written, magnetic, electronic , or other form and regardless of whether expressly identified as confidential (“Confidential Information”) .
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to 'Confidential Information', which is explicitly defined in the 'Contradicted Text' excerpt. The changed text replaces 'Confidential Information' with 'Proprietary Data', which, as the 'Perturbation Explanation' states, is not defined anywhere in the contract. This creates a significant ambiguity and directly contradicts the 'Contradicted Text' because the NDA now relies on an undefined term, making it unclear what information is actually protected, thus causing an in-text contradiction.
